name: Beef Broccoli
description: is a recipe uses thinly sliced beef, fresh broccoli, and a simple sauce made with soy sauce, oyster sauce, and ginger.

name: Beef Caldereta
description: is a Filipino beef stew cooked in tomato sauce with liver spread and uses vegetable (potatoes, carrots, bell peppers, and olives along with the beef).

name: Beef Kare-Kare
description: is a version of kare-kare or peanut stew that makes use of beef chuck.  It was perfect with some spicy shrimp paste. It has a vegetable eggplant, string beans and spoon cabbage(Bok choy)

name: Bistek
description: is a version of the Filipinos beef steak marinated in soy sauce, kalamansi juice and a chopped onion rings.

name: Bopis
description: is a piquant Filipino dish of pork or beef lungs and heart sautéed in tomatoes, chilies and onions.

name: Pinapaitan
description: is a traditional Filipino dish known for its bold and robust flavors. It is a soup made with beef tripe and innards, cooked with bile and various spices. The dish is known for its bitter taste.
